service_list.name: Roof Restorations
service_list.brief: Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane provides affordable and long-lasting roof restoration services for tiled and metal roofs.

service_list.name: Tiled Roof Restoration
service_list.brief: They restore tiled roofs, including terracotta tiles, to improve appearance and roof condition.

service_list.name: Metal Roof Restoration
service_list.brief: They offer metal roof restoration services for residential and commercial properties.

service_list.name: Terracotta Roof Restoration
service_list.brief: Their quote form explicitly lists terracotta roof restoration as a service option.

service_list.name: Roof Repairs
service_list.brief: They repair roofing issues including leaks, blocked gutters, storm damage, and general roofing faults.

service_list.name: Roof Painting
service_list.brief: They provide roof painting services, including roof tile painting and roof upgrades.

service_list.name: Whirlybirds
service_list.brief: They offer whirlybird installation and promote free whirlybirds with selected jobs.

service_list.name: Colour Charts
service_list.brief: They provide colour chart guidance to help customers choose roof colours.

testimonials.quote: We just bought our first investment property and the tiles looked like the need a facelift. We had the team from Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane clean and restore the terracotta tiles. The house looks amazing now, highly recommended.
testimonials.author: Julie Weir

key_messaging: premium quality services at affordable rates

improved_hero_copy.h1: Brisbane Roof Restorations Built To Last
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Restore, repair, and protect your tiled or metal roof with experienced local roofing specialists. Call 07 3062 8404 for a free quote.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Roof Restoration Brisbane Homeowners Can Trust
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Over 20 years of roof restoration and repair experience across Brisbane, with affordable results for residential and commercial properties.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Bring Your Roof Back To Its Best
improved_hero_copy.subhead: From roof repairs and painting to tiled, terracotta, and metal roof restorations, Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane helps protect your property from harsh Queensland weather.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Roof Restorations
improved_service_descriptions.description: Extend the life of your roof with a full restoration designed to improve protection, street appeal, and long-term durability.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Tiled Roof Restoration
improved_service_descriptions.description: Refresh worn tiled roofs with cleaning, repairs, and restoration work that helps prevent leaks and improves appearance.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Metal Roof Restoration
improved_service_descriptions.description: Restore faded or weathered metal roofing with practical repairs and finishes suited to Brisbane conditions.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Terracotta Roof Restoration
improved_service_descriptions.description: Revive terracotta roof tiles with specialist restoration that brings back colour, finish, and protection.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Roof Repairs
improved_service_descriptions.description: Fix roof leaks, blocked gutters, storm damage, and general roofing issues before they become larger structural problems.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Roof Painting
improved_service_descriptions.description: Upgrade your roof’s look and weather resistance with professional roof painting and colour selection support.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Whirlybirds
improved_service_descriptions.description: Improve roof ventilation with whirlybird installation for better airflow through your roof space.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Colour Charts
improved_service_descriptions.description: Choose a roof colour with confidence using available colour chart guidance before painting or restoration begins.

meta_descriptions.description: Need roof restoration in Brisbane? Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane repairs, paints, and restores tiled and metal roofs. Call 07 3062 8404 for a free quote.
Learn about Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane, local roofing specialists with over 20 years of experience and a 100% customer satisfaction guarantee.
Contact Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane for roof restoration, repairs, painting, and whirlybird installation across Brisbane. Call 07 3062 8404.
Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane services Brisbane Northside, Southside, and South East Queensland with affordable roof restoration and repair work.
Read customer testimonials for Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane and see why local clients recommend their roof restoration and repair services.
Explore seasonal roof restoration specials from Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane and request a quote for affordable restoration work.
Pro Roof Restoration Brisbane provides premium roof restoration, repairs, and painting at affordable rates for local homeowners and businesses.
Read the Brisbane roof restoration guide covering roof condition, restoration basics, and how to choose the right roofing company.
Thinking about DIY roof restoration? Learn the safety, regulation, and practical issues before working on your own roof.
Is roof restoration worth it? Compare the benefits, costs, and protection value before deciding whether to restore your roof.

trust_signals_to_emphasize: real customer testimonial from Julie Weir, Yatala

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the core local positioning, phone-led quote flow, service breadth, Brisbane/South East Queensland coverage, logo, testimonials, and trust claims such as over 20 years of experience and the 100% customer satisfaction guarantee. Improve the redesign by making the homepage clearer and more conversion-focused, separating each service into scannable benefit-led sections, modernising the dated WordPress/Avada visual presentation, surfacing proof earlier, tightening SEO copy, and making the quote CTA consistent across desktop and mobile. This matters because roof restoration is a high-trust local purchase: visitors need to quickly understand what roofs the company restores, why the team is credible, where they service, and how to request a quote without friction.
